response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified scene 1 (00:00-02:13) as intro talk. 2. Identified scene 2 (02:14-05:00) as a musical performance. 3. Used OCR and visual context to identify the song as 'エアーマンが倒せない' (Airman ga Taosenai). 4. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and English translation. 5. Compiled the JSON based on the provided schema.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Hakata Koyori introducing her 'Game Song Live' concert theme, followed by a duet performance of the popular song 'Airman ga Taosenai' with VTuber Ookami Mio.

scenes.description: Hakata Koyori greets the audience, explains the theme of her concert, 'Game Song Live', and discusses her love for game music.
Hakata Koyori and Ookami Mio perform 'Airman ga Taosenai'. The stage features retro game-style visuals.
scenes.song_title: エアーマンが倒せない
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
気がついたら、同じ面ばかりプレイ、 
そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ。 
あきらめずに、消える足場に挑戦するけど、 
すぐに下が落ちるよー 
「アイテム2号」があれば、楽に向こうの岸までに着くけど、 
何回やっても、何回やっても、エアーマンが倒せないよ！ 
あの竜巻何回やってもよけれない！ 
後ろに回って打ち続けるけれど、いずれ風に飛ばされる 
タイム連打を試してみたけど、 
竜巻相手じゃ意味が無い！！ 
だから、次ぎは絶対勝つために、 
僕は、「E缶」だけは、最後までとっておく 

気がついたら、「ライフ」もう少しかない 
そしていつもそこで「E缶」使う 
あきらめずに、エアーマンまでたどり着くけれど、すぐにザンキなくなる 
リーフシールドがあれば楽にエアーマンを倒せるけど、 
何回やっても、何回やっても、ウッドマンがたおせないよ！！ 
落ちる木の葉は、何回やってもよけれない！ 
後ろに下がって！距離をとっても、いずれ距離をつめられる 
タイム連打を試してみたけど、あいつのジャンプはくぐれない！ 
だけど、次は絶対勝つために 
僕は、「E缶」だけは、最後までとっておく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When I realized, I was playing the same level, 
And always dying in the same place. 
I don't give up, I keep challenging the disappearing platforms, 
But I fall straight down. 
If I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other shore, 
But no matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try, I can't beat Airman! 
No matter how many times I try, I can't dodge those tornadoes! 
I try to go behind and keep shooting, but eventually, I get blown away by the wind. 
I tried button-mashing the time, 
But it's meaningless against the tornado!! 
So, to win next time, 
I'll save only the E-Tank until the very end. 

When I realized, I had only a little bit of life left, 
And I always use an E-Tank there. 
I don't give up, I reach Airman, 
But I run out of lives immediately. 
If I had Leaf Shield, I could easily beat Airman, 
But no matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try, I can't beat Woodman!! 
No matter how many times I try, I can't dodge those falling leaves! 
Even if I go behind and keep my distance, eventually, the distance is closed. 
I tried button-mashing the time, 
But I can't slip past his jump! 
So, to win next time, 
I'll save only the E-Tank until the very end.
